title: Zillow Group, Inc. (Z) Stock Price, News, Quote & History - Yahoo Finance
text: Zillow Stock News and Market Analysis. Recent Stock Performance and Analyst Consensus: Zillow Group shows mixed market sentiment with analysts providing varied forecasts. The consensus rating among 25 analysts is "Buy", with a 12-month stock price target of $73.64, representing an increase of 95.54% from recent prices. Stock Dynamics: Despite positive earnings surprises and strong operational performance, Zillow shares have experienced volatility. Recent earnings announcements have sometimes resulted in after-hours declines despite beating expectations, suggesting investor focus on forward guidance and near-term headwinds. Key Investor Considerations: Investors monitor: (1) Quarterly revenue growth trends relative to real estate market conditions, (2) Progress in profitability on a GAAP basis, (3) Growth trajectories of high-margin businesses like mortgages and rentals, (4) Success of AI product initiatives in user engagement and monetization, (5) Competitive pressures in the online real estate marketplace space. Market Sentiment: The stock appeals to investors seeking exposure to digital real estate platforms with diversified revenue streams and growth initiatives, though near-term guidance misses can trigger sell-offs despite fundamental improvements.
